memoryArtifacts.description:
Richard Fiske; b. say 1493.
     He resided at Broadgates, Laxfield, co. Suffolk, England.

     Known children of Richard Fiske include:
                 i. John Fiske; b. circa 1514. …

zh.lifeSummary: Geoffrey Fiske是Geoffrey Fiske的兒子，於大約1472年出生在英國素福爾可拉可費爾德。他於大約1500年與Alice Dalling在英國英格蘭素福爾可拉可費爾德結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1565年在英國英格蘭素福爾可拉可費爾德享年94歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可賀金哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Geoffrey Fiske是Geoffrey Fiske的儿子，于大约1472年出生在英国素福爾可拉可費爾德。他于大约1500年与Alice Dalling在英国英格兰素福爾可拉可費爾德结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1565年在英国英格兰素福爾可拉可費爾德享年94岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可賀金哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Fiske
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from a farm in western Norway, named from Old Norse fiskr ‘fish’ + -e from vin ‘meadow’.

variants.name: Fisk
meanings: English (East Anglia): metonymic occupational name for a fisherman or fish seller, or a nickname for someone supposedly resembling a fish in some way, from Old Norse fiskr ‘fish’ (cognate with Old English fisc). See Fish 1.

nameMeanings.name: Geoffrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: Geoffrey Fiske was born about 1472, in Laxfield, Suffolk, England as the son of Geoffrey Fiske. He married Alice Dalling about 1500, in Laxfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1565, in Laxfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 94, and was buried in Heckingham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Geoffrey Fiske est né environ 1472, à Laxfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, fils de Geoffrey Fiske. Il a épousé Alice Dalling environ 1500, à Laxfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1565, à Laxfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 94 ans, et a été enterré à Heckingham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Geoffrey Fiske wurde um 1472 in Laxfield, Suffolk, England, als Sohn von Geoffrey Fiske geboren. Er hat um 1500 in Laxfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Alice Dalling geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1565 im Alter von 94 Jahren in Laxfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Heckingham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Geoffrey Fiske è nato il circa 1472 nel Laxfield, Suffolk, England come figlio di Geoffrey Fiske. Lui sposato Alice Dalling circa 1500, nel Laxfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1565, nel Laxfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 94 anni, e fu sepolto a Heckingham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Geoffrey Fiskeは約1472年にイギリススフォルクラクスフィールドでGeoffrey Fiskeの息子として生まれた。約1500年にイギリスイギリススフォルクラクスフィールドでAlice Dallingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1565年にイギリスイギリススフォルクラクスフィールドで94歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクヘクインガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffrey Fiske(은)는 대략 1472년 영국 수폴크 라스필드에서 Geoffrey Fiske의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1500년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 라스필드에서 Alice Dalling(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1565년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 라스필드에서 94세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 헤킨그함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Geoffrey Fiske nasceu aproximadamente 1472, em Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra filho de Geoffrey Fiske. Ele casou-se com Alice Dalling aproximadamente 1500, em Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1565, em Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 94 anos, e foi sepultado em Heckingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Geoffrey Fiske родился около 1472 г. в местности лаксфиелд, суффолк, Англия. Его отца звали Geoffrey Fiske. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Dalling около 1500 г. в местности лаксфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1565 г. в местности лаксфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 94 лет и был похоронен в местности хеккингхам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Geoffrey Fiske nació aproximadamente 1472, en Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra como hijo de Geoffrey Fiske. Se casó con Alice Dalling aproximadamente 1500, en Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1565, en Laxfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 94 años, y fue sepultado en Heckingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
